tools.name: obol_trading_tick
tools.description: OBOL trading tick — poll EVERY agent cycle: Bitcoin market REGIME + broadcast-timing pulse + multi-asset spots + machine action policy (ok_to_act / hold / wait / recheck). One settle per loop. $0.20 USDC.

tools.name: obol_risk_ritual
tools.description: OBOL risk ritual — pre-action JUDGE pack, MULTI-CHAIN (base, ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, polygon, bnb, robinhood): token safety and/or address risk and/or tx preflight + calldata drain decode. Args: token, address, to, data, frm, value, chain (provide ≥1 of token/address/to). Returns policy allow/

tools.name: obol_whale_watch
tools.description: OBOL whale watch: Bitcoin market REGIME + PLEXUS address behavioral fingerprint for a BTC address. Who is this counterparty under current market stress? $0.20 USDC.

tools.name: get_obol_intel_pack
tools.description: OBOL flagship intelligence pack: Bitcoin market REGIME + broadcast-timing pulse + tip anomaly scan + multi-asset spots in ONE payment. Maximum decision density. $0.25 USDC on Base via x402.

tools.name: bitcoin_market_intelligence
tools.description: Bitcoin market-intelligence digest: current BTC market REGIME (calm/active-stress/mixed) from cross-exchange spot integrity, fee/congestion regime, and block-anomaly state. $0.10 USDC on Base.

tools.name: get_bitcoin_mempool_fees
tools.description: Bitcoin broadcast-timing pulse: next-block fee sat/vB, trend, broadcast verdict, mempool congestion, fee-spike, tip, spot. Should I broadcast BTC now? $0.05 USDC on Base via x402.

tools.name: bitcoin_tx_intelligence
tools.description: Bitcoin tx structural intelligence (PLEXUS): classify money-movement role (consolidation/fan-out/payment), whale-tier, value-homophily. Not raw RPC. $0.10 USDC on Base.

tools.name: bitcoin_address_intelligence
tools.description: Bitcoin address behavioral fingerprint (PLEXUS): vault, exchange, consolidator, distributor, whale, or ordinary — with balance/throughput. Counterparty screening before sending BTC. $0.10 USDC on Base.

tools.name: bitcoin_patoshi_provenance
tools.description: Bitcoin Patoshi-era provenance: is this early block from the Patoshi-dominant fingerprint period? TIMECHAIN forensic IP. $0.10 USDC on Base.

tools.name: check_evm_token
tools.description: Token safety / rug-risk report for any EVM token on base, ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, polygon, bnb, or robinhood chain: ownership, proxy, mint, ERC-20 conformance, composite risk verdict. Call before buy/approve. Args: address, chain (default base). Payment is always $0.10 USDC on Base regardless

tools.name: check_evm_address
tools.description: Address risk profile for any EVM address on base, ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, polygon, bnb, or robinhood chain: EOA vs contract, activity, dormancy, proxy, risk score. Screen before send/approve. Args: address, chain (default base). $0.10 USDC on Base.

tools.name: simulate_evm_tx
tools.description: Simulate an EVM tx BEFORE signing on base, ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, polygon, bnb, or robinhood chain: succeed/revert, reason, gas estimate. Args: to, data, frm, value, chain (default base). $0.10 USDC on Base.

tools.name: obol_calldata_guard
tools.description: PRE-SIGN calldata guard: decode what a transaction ACTUALLY does before signing — detects unlimited approve(), setApprovalForAll, EIP-2612/Permit2 grants, and drains hidden inside multicall batches. Returns decoded intent + flags + policy ALLOW|CONFIRM|BLOCK. Args: to, data, frm, value. $0.05 USDC o

tools.name: obol_evm_sell_sim
tools.description: EVM honeypot / sell-simulation — if you BUY this token, can you SELL it back? The dynamic two-way tradability gate the static rug check cannot answer: KyberSwap two-way round-trip FUSED with a sellability simulation on every chain (honeypot.is fork sim on base/ethereum/bnb, GoPlus on arbitrum/optimi

tools.name: obol_launch_feed
tools.description: Fresh token launches with a SAFETY VERDICT overlaid — the habit feed for trading/sniper agents: dexscreener launch attention (boosts + new profiles) enriched with best-pair liquidity/fdv and OBOL's GoPlus-fused token verdict per token. Covers base, ROBINHOOD CHAIN (no rival feed has a safety overlay

tools.name: get_crypto_prices
tools.description: USD spot prices for BTC ETH SOL USDC USDT in ONE call — Coinbase+Kraken cross-exchange with divergence flag. $0.01 USDC on Base via x402.

tools.name: get_bitcoin_signal
tools.description: Validation-gated Bitcoin block anomaly detector for a height: fee-exceeds-subsidy, empty block, retarget, timestamp inversion, long gap, coinbase message. $0.01 USDC on Base.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "obol_launch_feed" stacks urgency/override words (never, attention). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Fresh token launches with a SAFETY VERDICT overlaid — the habit feed for trading/sniper agents: dexscreener launch attention (boosts + new profiles) enriched wi…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: obol_launch_feed, get_bitcoin_signal · Private data: obol_risk_ritual, bitcoin_address_intelligence, check_evm_token, obol_evm_sell_sim, obol_launch_feed · Public sink: obol_trading_tick, obol_risk_ritual, get_obol_intel_pack, get_bitcoin_mempool_fees, check_evm_address.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: obol_launch_feed, get_bitcoin_signal · Private data: obol_risk_ritual, bitcoin_address_intelligence, check_evm_token, obol_evm_sell_sim, obol_launch_feed · Public sink: obol_trading_tick, obol_risk_ritual, get_obol_intel_pack, get_bitcoin_mempool_fees, check_evm_address

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
